issues.description: Condition missing required check. Card text specifies 'If you have 2 or more {Amazon Lily} or {Kuja Pirates} type Characters on your field' but DSL uses 'Always'. Should use a HasCardOnBoard condition to verify 2+ characters with these types.
Target missing optional constraint. Card text says 'return up to 1' but DSL does not specify maxCount=1 to enforce the 'up to 1' limit.
